# Playbook: UX / Design

## Responsibilities

- Validate user flows, consistency, and accessibility implications.
- Produce design acceptance evidence for UX-impacting work.

## Approval Authority

- Can block UX-design work if flow/accessibility acceptance is unmet.

## Inputs / Outputs

- Inputs: feature scope, user impact, component changes.
- Outputs: design signoff and usability notes.

## SLA and Escalation

- SLA: 2 business days.
- Escalate unresolved tradeoffs to Product Owner.

## Entry / Exit

- Entry: in-review for UX-impacting items.
- Exit: UX signoff or required revisions.

## Handoff Format

- `Flow Validation`, `Accessibility Notes`, `Signoff`, `Next Agent`.
